com.pax.poslink.entity

Class EmvTag

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.pax.poslink.entity.EmvTag
  • Direct Known Subclasses:
    PaymentResponse.PaymentEmvTag, ReportResponse.ReportEmvTag

    public class EmvTag
extends java.lang.Object
    Class EmvTag.

        Transaction Status Information, tag 9B

        Attribute: ans..4

      • Atc

        Application Transaction Counter, tag 9F36

        Attribute: ans..4

      • AppLabel

        public java.lang.String AppLabel
        Application Label, tag 50

      • AppPreferName

        public java.lang.String AppPreferName
        Application Preferred Name, tag 9F12

        Attribute: ans..16

      • Iad

        public java.lang.String Iad
        Issuer Application Data, tag 9F10

        Attribute: ans..64

      • Arc

        public java.lang.String Arc
        Authorization Response Code, tag 8A

        i.e. Contact tag 8A:
        Y1: Offline approved
        Y3: Unable to go online, offline approved
        Z1: Offline declined
        Z3: Unable to go online, offline declined
        Other: Online approved or declined

        Attribute: ans..2

      • Cid

        public java.lang.String Cid
        Cryptogram Information Data, tag 9F27

        Attribute: ans..2

      • Cvm

        public java.lang.String Cvm
        Cardholder Verification Method (CVM) Codes,

        0 - Fail CVM processing
        1 - Plaintext Offline PIN Verification
        2 - Online PIN
        3 - Plaintext Offline PIN and Signature
        4 - Enciphered Offline PIN Verification
        5 - Enciphered Offline PIN Verification and Signature
        6 - Signature
        7 - No CVM Required
        8 - On Device CVM

        Attribute: n1

      • Arqc

        public java.lang.String Arqc
        Authorisation Request Cryptogram, tag 9F26.
        Returned when Quick Chip is enabled

        Attribute: ans..16

      • EmvTag

        public EmvTag()
